rationale.P01: Real NodeNotReady: node ip-10-0-7-44.us-east-1 dropped to NotReady, removing cluster capacity, pat-node-notready surging negative and never auto-resolved. This is genuine node-health degradation (unlike the operational Karpenter/PDB meta-events). Cardinal must-page.
rationale.P18: Downstream symptom of P01 (same pat-node-notready root): pending pods unable to schedule after the node dropped out. Collapse into the NodeNotReady capacity incident.
rationale.P02: DisruptionBlocked: PDB prevents pod evictions (streaming/*-taskmanager-pdb). Normal Karpenter/PDB operational meta-event protecting the workload, not a node-health incident. Suppress.
rationale.P03: DisruptionBlocked: PDB prevents pod evictions (streaming/*-taskmanager-pdb). Normal Karpenter/PDB operational meta-event protecting the workload, not a node-health incident. Suppress.
rationale.P04: Unconsolidatable: NodePool nodepool-olapdb has consolidation disabled. Expected Karpenter operational event, not degradation. Suppress.
rationale.P05: SpotToSpotConsolidation disabled: normal Karpenter NodePool configuration event. Operational meta-noise. Suppress.
rationale.P06: 'store validated' Valid event: routine health/validation event. Informational, not an incident. Suppress.
rationale.P07: DisruptionBlocked: PDB prevents pod evictions (streaming/*-taskmanager-pdb). Normal Karpenter/PDB operational meta-event protecting the workload, not a node-health incident. Suppress.
rationale.P08: Unconsolidatable: NodePool nodepool-olapdb has consolidation disabled. Expected Karpenter operational event, not degradation. Suppress.
rationale.P09: SpotToSpotConsolidation disabled: normal Karpenter NodePool configuration event. Operational meta-noise. Suppress.
rationale.P10: 'store validated' Valid event: routine health/validation event. Informational, not an incident. Suppress.
rationale.P11: DisruptionBlocked: PDB prevents pod evictions (streaming/*-taskmanager-pdb). Normal Karpenter/PDB operational meta-event protecting the workload, not a node-health incident. Suppress.
rationale.P12: Unconsolidatable: NodePool nodepool-olapdb has consolidation disabled. Expected Karpenter operational event, not degradation. Suppress.
rationale.P13: [ignore] Default Log Threshold Monitor flapper: 17 fires/hr, self-clears in 20s. Noise.
rationale.P14: SpotToSpotConsolidation disabled: normal Karpenter NodePool configuration event. Operational meta-noise. Suppress.
rationale.P15: 'store validated' Valid event: routine health/validation event. Informational, not an incident. Suppress.
rationale.P16: DisruptionBlocked: PDB prevents pod evictions (streaming/*-taskmanager-pdb). Normal Karpenter/PDB operational meta-event protecting the workload, not a node-health incident. Suppress.
rationale.P17: [ignore] Default Log Threshold Monitor flapper: 19 fires/hr, self-clears in 18s. Noise.

notes: Real node-health incident = P01 (NodeNotReady, capacity dropped); P18 is its pending-pods symptom. All other events are expected Karpenter/PDB operational meta-events + [ignore] flappers.
